# robots.txt — VitePress copies docs/public/* to dist/ root.
#
# Strategy: allow everything for normal crawlers, but slow down
# aggressive scrapers that don't help SEO (semrush / ahrefs / etc).
# The sitemap is declared so crawlers discover all pages.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /assets/

# Crawl-delay: 1 second between requests is polite without being
# punishing. Bing/Yandex/etc. honor this; Google ignores it.
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap — discoverable at well-known path. GitHub Pages serves it
# at the URL below.
Sitemap: https://veawho.github.io/via54Skills/sitemap.xml
